calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Sep-24-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WILSHIRE COMMERCIAL CAPITAL LLC. DBA WILSHIRE CONSUMER CREDIT's HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

The claim of exemption is granted in part. The sheriff shall withhold $300 per twice-monthly pay period or $600 per monthly pay period.

proposed order to be signed.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
